name: The Back Nine Golf | Summerlin, NV
address: 1930 Village Center Cir Suite 1, Las Vegas, NV 89134
about: The Back Nine Golf in Summerlin, Las Vegas, is a golf simulation venue that offers a modern approach to the game. While the specific technology and amenities are not detailed on the current webpage, the venue aims to provide an accessible golfing experience. It is designed for various skill levels and likely features a range of simulation options. The pricing structure and booking details are not publicly available at this time.
why_golfers_like_it: Modern simulation technology for realistic play
Versatile space for individuals and groups
Likely offers coaching for skill improvement
Environment suitable for casual and serious play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available for food and snacks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, or you can rent clubs at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar menu.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the simulator software and group size.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Back Nine Golf welcomes juniors and is suitable for families with children of all ages.
